Petition For Order For Partition And Sale Of Trust Real Property; For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Continued To Feb-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Anderson for Peter Karsant (Individually). Donald Putterman for Peter Karsant (Respondent). John Boessenecker for Anna Karsant (Petitioner).

Counsel informed the Court that mediation is still in progress. The Petition for Order for Partition and Sale of Trust Real Property, etc. was continued to February 6, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status of mediation.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order For Partition And Sale Of Trust Real Property; For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Continued To Dec-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order For Partition And Sale Of Trust Real Property; For Accounting; For Damages For Breach Of Trust; And For Award Of Attorney Fees And
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Continued To Nov-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Anderson for Peter Karsant (Objector).

Ms. Anderson stated that they were still in negotation stage, that the properties were appraised and that they were working on resolving the matter. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation is to be completed by November 16, 2011. The Parties are to report to the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 17, 2011. The matter was continued to November 21, 2011 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.

Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Continued To Jun-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Anderson for Peter Karsant (Trustee). John boessenceker for Anna karsant (Petitioner).

Counsel agreed to a 60-day continuance to try and resolve the matter. The Petition for Order for Partition and Sale of Trust Real Property, etc. was continued to June 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
